data.content: Branch: knot/foolery-d8ae (3 commits: 7ac0ba6f, bbbfe832, 2ce59750). Adds toml-reader.sh for reading existing settings.toml into KV store. Setup/agent-wizard now load config before prompts so all wizards are additive. _prompt_action_choice defaults to current agent. _prompt_single_pool shows existing pools with Keep/Reconfigure option. _SETUP_INPUT/_SETUP_OUTPUT variables enable testability. Three test suites: setup-additive (20 tests), setup-interactive (5 tests, piped stdin verifying keep-by-default), setup-settings-writer (6 tests). All quality gates pass: lint, tsc, 2653 tests, build.
